---
title: "Buenas Prácticas en Bioinformática"
author: "enosedal"
format: html
---

# Objective

To demonstrate knowledge and ease of use with basic best bioinformatic practices through a reproducible toy script for simple FASTA file analysis.

# Tools Used

- Python
- Git
- GitHub
- Quarto

# Developed Script

The fasta_stats.py script calculates:
- Number of sequences
- Total sequence length
- Basic file validation

# Defensive Programming

The script includes:
- Argument validation
- Error handling
- Clear feedback messages to prevent crashes

# Execution Example

```bash
python scripts/fasta_stats.py example_data/example.fasta
```

# Reproducibility

The project was organized using best practices to ensure tasks don't hinder collaborative work:
- Modular file structure
- Version control with Git and GitHub
- Proper documentation via a clean README
- Reproducible document generation with Quarto
